crime.value: Attempted murder by husband with dissociative identity disorder, believing himself to be Lt. Luke Palmer
crime.quote: Lt. Luke Palmer kills his wife. Which was exactly what Ben tried to do.

victim.value: Lillia, newlywed wife targeted due to husband's mental illness and obsession with fictional character
victim.quote: He was obsessed with the character of Lt. Luke Palmer.

closed_world.value: The newlyweds' house where they moved a month after marriage
closed_world.quote: Lillia and Ben shifted in this house a month ago, right after they got married.

culprit_and_motive.value: Ben, suffering from dissociative identity disorder, attempts to kill his wife while believing he is Lt. Luke Palmer
culprit_and_motive.quote: He has Dissociative identity disorder. He wasn't him when it happened.

resolution.value: Janice calls 911 after witnessing Ben in British army dress, Ben is institutionalized in asylum

investigator.value: Janice, the friend who discovers the truth and protects Lillia
investigator.quote: I was in your house, to know what is he gonna do.

suspect_architecture.value: Three suspects: Ben (husband with dissociative identity disorder), Janice (friend with access and knowledge), and initially Luke Palmer (mysterious letter sender who doesn't exist)
suspect_architecture.quote: He has Dissociative identity disorder. He wasn't him when it happened. He was obsessed with the character of Lt. Luke Palmer.

red_herring.value: Luke Palmer as external threat - mysterious letters from unknown sender misdirect from the real danger being Ben's split personality
red_herring.quote: Do we know any 'Luke Palmer'? Lillia asked Ben while looking at the envelope. 'No, I don't think so.'

clue_fairness.value: Book about Lt. Luke Palmer visible to reader in Ben's study, Ben's behavior changes, and his obsession with the character are all shown before revelation
clue_fairness.quote: my eyes caught this name 'Luke Palmer'. So I read it, everything was just like the way we read in letter.

social_world.value: Newlywed couple isolated in countryside house, with friend as only social connection - insular domestic world with limited external authority
social_world.quote: Lillia and Ben shifted in this house a month ago, right after they got married. They were from the same countryside

alibi.value: Ben's alibi of getting food collapses when Janice witnesses him in British army dress at midnight planning the murder
alibi.quote: Then around midnight, I saw him coming out of the study in the dress which was used was Bristish army

reveal_mechanic.value: Psychological diagnosis of dissociative identity disorder explains how Ben became Luke Palmer, demonstrated by his costume and behavior
reveal_mechanic.quote: He has Dissociative identity disorder. He wasn't him when it happened. He was obsessed with the character

media_and_audience.value: Police investigation and institutionalization - crime processed through medical/psychiatric framework rather than purely criminal
media_and_audience.quote: Right after cop investigated me... I called 911... as she parked the car in front of an asylum

investigator_wound.value: Lillia must confront that her new husband tried to kill her, testing her capacity for love and forgiveness in marriage
investigator_wound.quote: Nothing love, you just had an accident, you will be alright.' Lillia said and hugged him

_meta.title: ebook mahmood ul hassan the letters
